description_long: This object consists of a black, ornate metal candelabrum with four arms, each designed to hold a candle, accompanied by five cream-colored wax candles with visible wicks and some melted wax details. The candelabrum features a central stem with a round base for stability and four cup-like holders at the top, each capable of supporting a candle. The candles themselves are of varying heights and display realistic melted wax drips and exposed wicks, some with a slightly burnt tip. The metal holder has a matte, slightly rough finish, while the candles have a softer, semi-matte appearance. The overall design suggests a classic, slightly gothic aesthetic suitable for decorative or ambient lighting in urban settings. The components are separate, allowing the candles to be placed in or removed from the holder as desired.
description: A black metal candelabrum with four arms and five cream-colored wax candles, featuring realistic melted wax drips and exposed wicks. The set has a classic, decorative appearance suitable for tabletop display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the assembled candelabrum with four candles placed in the holders and one candle in the center, all wicks visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the candelabrum and candles separated, clearly displaying the individual candle shapes and the empty holders.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the candelabrum and the full set of five candles, all with visible wicks and wax drips.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the candelabrum and candles separated, showing the round bases and the melted wax details on the candles.
